notes: HAR-222 local-runtime fixture for paymentTermsCreate/update/delete. Shopify documents the 2026-04 standalone mutation/input shapes, and HAR-221 captured the paymentTermsTemplates catalog used for template projection. Live success-path parity still requires a disposable order or draft order because these mutations alter payment schedules and payment status; the integration test enforces local staging, downstream reads, validation guardrails, no runtime upstream writes, and raw mutation order for commit replay.
